strengths: Actively building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on, production-level AI platform work that directly maps to the role's AI builder requirement.

17+ years of engineering experience spanning embedded systems, high-throughput data pipelines (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), and full-stack product work — well exceeding the 15-year minimum with rare cross-domain depth.

Demonstrated entrepreneurial and community leadership: founded GISCollective (open-source, real-world users), delivered public conference talks (FOSS4G), and designed and ran multi-day technical workshops — evidence of the external influence and inspiration the role requires.
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; holds a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts degree — the preferred advanced AI academic credential is absent.

AI experience, while current and hands-on, is at the tooling and infrastructure layer (MCP generators, agentic workflow frameworks) rather than at the strategic advisory or AI product platform level the role targets.

Career title trajectory (Senior/Staff Software Developer/Engineer) reflects strong individual contribution but does not yet signal director-level IC scope or experience advising enterprise customers on AI adoption strategy.

key_factors.factor: Breadth and tenure of engineering experience
No advanced AI degree or strategic advisory track record

response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination of practical AI infrastructure work (actively shipping MCP frameworks and agentic tooling today), 17+ years of cross-domain engineering depth, and a proven ability to inspire and educate technical communities through talks, workshops, and open-source leadership — all of which speak directly to the builder, advisor, and influencer dimensions of this role. While he lacks the preferred advanced AI degree and has not yet operated at a named director-level scope, his trajectory is strongly upward: his current AI work is at the frontier of agentic systems, and his entrepreneurial founding of GISCollective demonstrates the autonomous, initiative-driven mindset the role demands. He is a credible high-upside candidate whose practical AI platform experience and communication track record make him well worth advancing.
